overall.description: First-person gameplay footage walking through a futuristic cyberpunk city at night. The scene features vibrant neon lighting, wet reflective streets, holographic advertisements, and crowds of NPCs. The player moves through covered walkways, open plazas with color-changing illuminated floors, and narrow corridors.

segments.scene_description: Walking through a covered commercial walkway with glowing neon floor strips shifting between orange and pink. The ceiling is illuminated with warm orange light, and a green neon sign is visible in the distance. Sparse pedestrians walk in opposing directions.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with color-changing illuminated pool and holographic billboard

pool floor color shifts rapidly through blue, green, yellow, red, and pink

concrete stairs with bright blue neon edge lighting
large holographic billboard displaying helmet with text 'SECURITY YOU CAN TRUST'
sparse trees with thin trunks in urban plaza setting

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered walkway into an open plaza featuring a large illuminated pool with rapidly shifting rainbow colors. A massive holographic security advertisement glows on the left while blue-lit stairs ascend on the right. Sparse pedestrians move through the space.

segments.scene_description: Walking through a covered commercial walkway with an orange-lit ceiling. Red vending machines line the right side while large digital ad screens display on the left. The crowd density increases as the camera moves through the space.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with wet reflective ground, neon-lit trees, and seating areas

segments.scene_description: Emerging into a large open plaza with wet pavement reflecting vibrant neon lights. Illuminated benches with orange glow line the path, and trees with colorful uplighting dot the area. The camera turns right while navigating around the seating areas.

segments.scene_description: Entering a narrow, enclosed corridor with dominant green and teal neon lighting. Vertical ad panels line the right wall while a striped concrete barrier runs along the left. The atmosphere becomes darker and more confined as the camera progresses through the passage.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-lit commercial district that transitions from a sheltered walkway into a vibrant open plaza before returning to a crowded corridor. It begins within a covered walkway where glowing floor strips shift between orange and pink beneath a warm orange ceiling. As the camera moves forward, the space opens into a wide plaza featuring a large pool of rapidly shifting rainbow colors, flanked by a massive holographic security advertisement and blue-lit stairs. The scene then shifts back into a covered walkway with an orange-lit ceiling, passing red vending machines and large digital ad screens. Finally, the environment becomes increasingly dense with pedestrians as the camera pushes deeper into the commercial hub.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a wide, vibrant open plaza into a dark and confined industrial corridor. It begins by emerging onto wet pavement reflecting a kaleidoscope of neon lights, moving past orange-glowing benches and trees accented with colorful uplighting. As the camera turns right to navigate around the seating areas, the expansive space begins to tighten. The scene then shifts abruptly into a narrow, enclosed passage where the lighting transforms into dominant shades of green and teal. This progression concludes as the camera moves deeper into the corridor, flanked by vertical ad panels and a striped concrete barrier while the atmosphere becomes increasingly dark and claustrophobic.
